name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.72: fixes draft-product cost transfer. When a receipt draft is finished into a real product, the parked net cost is now transferred explicitly and self-reports the outcome in the create response (draftResolved: netCostParked + netCostOnProduct read back). Also fixes the create-from-draft modal to prefill the cost field (gross, converted from the stored net) and pull draft data from an in-memory cache instead of scraping table cells (the scrape skipped the cost cell). Cumulative over v5.71 (product_drafts, deferred creation).
